rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in guarantee expressions by ensuring boolean types where required
Avoid adding invalid or unresolved identifiers in AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers in AGREE contracts
Ensure type consistency between declarations and expressions in AGREE
Place assumptions and guarantees in appropriate component type scopes
Validate that all identifiers in AGREE contracts are properly resolved
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must use bool type for guarantee expressions
Use valid AADL feature names and avoid package-qualified references
anti_patterns: Do not introduce invalid scalar type names like 'integer' or 'boolean' in AGREE
Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
irrelevant_topics: Component type vs implementation scope placement rules
AGREE annex block syntax and structure
